meta.title: Positioning Radar — Website Positioning Analysis
meta.description: Analyze your website's positioning against competitors. See where you stand and where there's room to differentiate.

hero.title: See where you stand in the competitive landscape
hero.subtitle: Enter your website URL. We'll find your competitors and show you an instant positioning map.

form.enterManually: I know my competitors — enter manually
form.industryHint: Leave empty to let AI detect automatically
form.competitorDiscoveryFailed: Couldn't find competitors automatically. Try again or enter them manually.

results.title: Positioning Analysis
results.scoreDescription: How unique is each company's positioning relative to others

cta.title: Want a deeper analysis with expert insights?
cta.description: Our positioning strategists will review your results, add industry context, and deliver concrete recommendations for standing out.
cta.thankYouDescription: We'll review your positioning analysis and get back to you with our expert insights within 2 business days.
cta.privacy: We'll only contact you about your positioning analysis.
